overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a waterfront promenade transitioning into an urban street and under an elevated highway overpass. The scene features a futuristic cityscape with towering glass skyscrapers, industrial dock structures, and cyberpunk aesthetic with vivid neon accents against a clear afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with industrial dock structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with the futuristic city skyline ahead

entered.detail: green metal safety railing running along the left side of the pedestrian path
rusted industrial buildings and docked boats along the waterfront
concrete utility pole with transformers and overhead cables
towering futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide waterfront promenade with clear afternoon skies. The camera moves forward along a green painted walkway bordered by a metal railing, with industrial dock structures visible to the left and the futuristic city skyline dominating the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway alongside vehicle street approaching overpass

events.description: pedestrian with red hair and purple beanie walks past camera in opposite direction
approaching the shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as pedestrians pass by and futuristic vehicles drive on the adjacent street to the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and beanie walking toward and past the camera
futuristic white sedan driving along the street parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway overpass with support pillars
tall reflective glass skyscraper with geometric facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open waterfront to a street-level walkway with an elevated highway structure rising on the right. Pedestrians begin appearing, walking in the opposite direction, while futuristic vehicles drive along the adjacent road. The camera approaches the shadow of the overpass as the industrial docks give way to urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass beneath elevated highway with digital signage

events.description: entering deep shadow under the concrete overpass with dramatic light contrast
passing stairs on the left and descending into the lower underpass level

agents.ego_description: navigating through the shaded underpass beneath the highway, passing by people sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting on a bench under the overpass shade

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars holding up the highway above
large illuminated digital screens displaying advertisements on building walls
multi-level concrete parking structure with open levels

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deep under the elevated highway into a shadowed urban canyon. The lighting shifts to a mix of deep shadows and bright patches of sunlight. Digital billboards illuminate the left side while massive concrete pillars support the overpass overhead. The camera descends slightly past stairs and continues through the covered walkway as vehicles pass underneath the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sunlit waterfront promenade into the shadowed depths of an urban highway underpass. It begins by gliding along a green painted walkway bordered by metal railings, with industrial dock structures to the left and a futuristic skyline dominating the horizon. As the camera moves forward, the open waterfront transitions into a street-level walkway where pedestrians and futuristic vehicles appear, and the industrial scenery gives way to dense urban architecture. The scene then shifts into the heavy shadow of an elevated highway, where the lighting transforms into a contrast of deep gloom and bright patches of sunlight. Finally, the camera descends slightly past concrete pillars and digital billboards, continuing through the covered walkway as vehicles pass overhead.
